content.text: {"issues":[{"key":"MCP-101","url":"https://jira.example.invalid/browse/MCP-101","fields":{"summary":"Complete sample onboarding checklist","status":{"name":"Done"},"assignee":{"displayName":"Sample Owner One"},"updated":"2026-06-16T09:15:00Z","project":{"name":"Sample Project"},"description":"Checklist is complete and ready for facilitator review."}},{"key":"MCP-102","url":"https://jira.example.invalid/browse/MCP-102","fields":{"summary":"Build generic status digest","status":{"name":"In Progress"},"assignee":{"displayName":"Sample Owner Two"},"updated":"2026-06-16T10:30:00Z","project":{"name":"Sample Project"},"description":"Implementation is moving through the local sample workflow."}},{"key":"MCP-103","url":"https://jira.example.invalid/browse/MCP-103","fields":{"summary":"Resolve sample dependency approval","status":{"name":"Blocked"},"assignee":{"displayName":"Sample Owner Three"},"updated":"2026-06-16T11:00:00Z","project":{"name":"Sample Project"},"description":"Cannot continue until generic dependency approval is available.","blocked_reason":"Waiting on generic dependency approval."}},{"key":"MCP-104","url":"https://jira.example.invalid/browse/MCP-104","fields":{"summary":"Choose sample rollout option","status":{"name":"In Progress"},"assignee":{"displayName":"Sample Facilitator"},"updated":"2026-06-16T11:45:00Z","project":{"name":"Sample Project"},"description":"Implementation depends on a generic rollout choice.","decision_needed":"Decide whether the sample rollout uses option A or option B."}},{"key":"MCP-105","url":"https://jira.example.invalid/browse/MCP-105","fields":{"summary":"Clarify sample ownership and state","status":{"name":"Unknown"},"updated":"2026-06-16T12:15:00Z","project":{"name":"Sample Project"},"description":"Ownership and current status need facilitator confirmation."}}]}
